'''Karena''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] scholar who first coined the term [[Jedi Praxeum|''praxeum'']] to refer to a [[Jedi academy]]. The word basically referred to a place for "the distillation of learning through action."

==Behind the scenes==
The term Jedi Praxeum, which means "a place for the learning of action", was coined by the author [[Wikipedia:Karen Anderson (writer)|Karen Anderson]] from the latinized version of the [[Wikipedia:Greek language|Greek]] word ''praxeion'', which comes from the word ''[[Wiktionary:Praxis|praxis]]''. The use of the word ''temple'' derived from [[Wikipedia:Shaolin Monastery|Shaolin Temple]] now commonly used for Jedi temples was considered, but rejected. The words like ''Academy'', ''Lyceum'', ''Stoas'', ''Seminary'', ''Campus'', ''cloister'', ''quad'', ''Monastery'', ''dojo'', ''Cadre'', ''Laboratory'', ''Dynurgy'' were also rejected.<ref name="AotEU">{{InsiderCite|147|Authors of the Expanded Universe|Authors of the Expanded Universe: Kevin J. Anderson}}</ref>
